creator: wen@FreeBSD.org
text:
The build failed, last lines of build log:

...
cc -DHAVE_CONFIG_H -DMIT_SCHEME -DDEFAULT_LIBRARY_PATH=\"/usr/local/lib/mit-scheme-x86-64-11.2\" -I. -I. -O3 -O2 -pipe  -fstack-protector-strong -fno-strict-aliasing  -frounding-math -fno-builtin-floor -Wall -Wempty-body -Wignored-qualifiers -Wimplicit-fallthrough -Wmissing-field-initializers -Wnested-externs -Woverride-init -Wpointer-arith -Wredundant-decls -Wshift-negative-value -Wstrict-prototypes -Wtype-limits -Wundef -Wuninitialized -Wwrite-strings -Werror -o uxproc.o -c uxproc.c
